import _objectSpread from"C:/Users/lenovo/Desktop/csr-support-system/node_modules/@babel/runtime/helpers/esm/objectSpread2.js";import{collection,getDocs,addDoc,deleteDoc,doc,updateDoc,serverTimestamp,orderBy,query}from"firebase/firestore";import{db}from"../firebase";async function fetchCollection(collectionName,orderField){try{const q=orderField?query(collection(db,collectionName),orderBy(orderField,"asc")):collection(db,collectionName);const snapshot=await getDocs(q);return snapshot.docs.map(d=>_objectSpread({id:d.id},d.data()));}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching ".concat(collectionName,":"),error);return[];}}// ── Knowledge Base ──────────────────────────────────────────────
export const getPolicies=()=>fetchCollection("knowledge_base");export const addPolicy=async(title,content,category)=>{try{await addDoc(collection(db,"knowledge_base"),{title,content,category,createdAt:serverTimestamp()});return true;}catch(error){console.error("Error adding policy:",error);return false;}};export const updatePolicy=async(id,title,content,category)=>{try{await updateDoc(doc(db,"knowledge_base",id),{title,content,category});return true;}catch(error){console.error("Error updating policy:",error);return false;}};export const deletePolicy=async id=>{try{await deleteDoc(doc(db,"knowledge_base",id));return true;}catch(error){console.error("Error deleting policy:",error);return false;}};// ── Banned Phrases ──────────────────────────────────────────────
export const getBannedPhrases=()=>fetchCollection("banned_phrases","wrongPhrase");export const addBannedPhrase=async(wrongPhrase,correctPhrase,severity,category)=>{try{await addDoc(collection(db,"banned_phrases"),{wrongPhrase,correctPhrase,severity,category});return true;}catch(error){console.error("Error adding banned phrase:",error);return false;}};export const updateBannedPhrase=async(id,wrongPhrase,correctPhrase,severity,category)=>{try{await updateDoc(doc(db,"banned_phrases",id),{wrongPhrase,correctPhrase,severity,category});return true;}catch(error){console.error("Error updating banned phrase:",error);return false;}};export const deleteBannedPhrase=async id=>{try{await deleteDoc(doc(db,"banned_phrases",id));return true;}catch(error){console.error("Error deleting banned phrase:",error);return false;}};// ── Action Types ────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const getActionTypes=()=>fetchCollection("action_types","name");export const addActionType=async name=>{try{await addDoc(collection(db,"action_types"),{name});return true;}catch(error){console.error("Error adding action type:",error);return false;}};export const updateActionType=async(id,name)=>{try{await updateDoc(doc(db,"action_types",id),{name});return true;}catch(error){console.error("Error updating action type:",error);return false;}};export const deleteActionType=async id=>{try{await deleteDoc(doc(db,"action_types",id));return true;}catch(error){console.error("Error deleting action type:",error);return false;}};
